caption: A man is recorded in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with beige suspenders, a small red bow tie, glasses, and headphones. He has a tall, grey, textured hairstyle. He is positioned behind a microphone, with a wall of framed photos and clothing racks behind him. On the left side of the screen, a logo features a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY" above the word "PODCAST". On the right side, another logo displays a red microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing and his head shifting slightly. He remains in the same seated position throughout, facing forward toward the microphone while gesturing with his facial expressions as he talks.
